Projects.title: AI Automation Solutions
desc: Architecting custom AI automation workflows for international clients — Talentor Singapore and Chennai Green Gifts — using Gemini, Llama, and Python-based automation pipelines to eliminate manual work and accelerate operations.
Delivers measurable process efficiency across e-commerce and service businesses, with custom LLM integrations tailored to each client's specific workflows and data structures.

Projects.title: Thulira
desc: Built a full-stack e-commerce platform for a sustainable home-goods brand, delivering end-to-end ownership from UI design to production deployment. Features include product listings, shopping cart, user authentication, admin dashboard, and payment integration — engineered to scale and rank.

Powered by Next.js, MongoDB, and Firebase, the architecture is fully SEO-optimized for biodegradable product search terms, targeting eco-conscious consumers shopping for sustainable kitchenware and gardenware.
A production-ready proof of full-stack depth, demonstrating complete ownership across frontend, backend, authentication, and infrastructure.

Projects.title: Chennai Green Gifts
desc: Engineered a full-stack e-commerce gift platform for a Chennai-based sustainable brand offering 100+ plant varieties — indoor and outdoor — with deep customization across personalized wishnotes, planters (ceramic, terracotta, coir), and packaging.

Built to serve wedding planners, corporate buyers, and event managers with bulk pricing up to 55% off, targeting a fast-growing market for eco-friendly return gifts at weddings, birthdays, and corporate events.
A conversion-focused storefront combining rich product discovery with a gifting experience rooted in ecological intent — serving a specialized audience across Chennai's event and corporate sectors.

Projects.title: Chennai Greens
desc: Built a dedicated platform for Chennai Greens, showcasing sustainable and eco-friendly products for a greener lifestyle.
Engineered with a focus on seamless user experience, responsive design, and robust performance.

Projects.title: Reetz
desc: Built the digital platform for a Singapore-based aviation advisory firm connecting airlines, lessors, MROs, financiers, and technology innovators across Asia Pacific and global aviation markets.

A precision-engineered B2B lead-generation and credibility platform on Next.js and Vercel, designed to unlock strategic partnerships at the intersection of aviation finance, operations, and technology.

Projects.title: Asia Tech Roofing
desc: Rebuilt a Singapore roofing firm's entire digital presence from a Webflow template into a production-grade Next.js application — featuring advanced GSAP ScrollTrigger animations, a 3D rotating cube component, and scroll-pinned service rows that deliver a cinematic browsing experience.

Integrated Google Reviews API and comprehensive structured data for local SEO/GEO dominance, serving a firm with 20+ years experience and 500+ completed projects across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors.
A technically sophisticated lead-generation machine that converts visitors across roof repair, leak repair, waterproofing, and structural works verticals in the Singapore market.

Projects.title: KSP General Contractors
desc: Executed a full content migration and custom rebuild for a Singapore Class 1 registered builder, delivering a multi-service lead-generation site covering painting, roofing, ceiling repairs, P.U. pressure grouting, and polycarbonate roofing.

Built with a Bauwerk-inspired services page architecture, free quote request system, project portfolio gallery, and 24/7 emergency response signals — all deployed on Next.js and Vercel with a clean client handoff workflow.

Projects.title: Smart FAQ Bot with Gemini AI
desc: Built an AI-powered FAQ chatbot using Gemini AI, LangChain, and FAISS vector search — directly applying GEO principles to understand how AI answer engines retrieve, contextualize, and surface structured content.
Demonstrates practical LLM integration for business use cases: semantic search over custom data, vector retrieval pipelines, and AI-consumable content architecture beyond traditional SEO.

Projects.title: Blockchain-Based Decentralized File Storage
desc: Full-stack DApp using React, MetaMask, and IPFS for decentralized file storage.
Demonstrates ability to work across technical blockchain implementation and user interface layers, utilizing Solidity smart contracts on the Polygon Amoy test network.

Projects.title: Mentor Connect App
desc: Mobile app for real-time mentoring with session scheduling, tracking, and AI chatbot for personalized guidance.
Designed and implemented clean mobile user flows and content architecture, integrating Firebase for real-time data sync.
